910: [Color:0xc]◆Summary[Color:0x0]
  More specifically, ”Cleopatra VII.”
  She is known as one of the greatest
  beauties ever to live, having charmed
  many with her musical voice and
  conversation skills. Her name means
  ”glory of the father” in Greek.
  After God's Plan, she started gathering
  parts to build a new body in order to
  resurrect herself. Bodiless, she
  accomplished this using her demon
  servants. It seems she intended to use
  parts from 1,465 bodies to contain her
  soul, perhaps in reference to the 1,465
  deities drawn on the Philae temple's
  walls. Asahi would have served as the
  1,465th and final piece of her new body.
  Once returned, she planned to rule over
  the world and bring about a new peace.
  She was ultimately defeated by [Flynn].
[END]
